headline: US strikes Iran 3rd straight night; Hormuz crisis spikes crude, hits Nifty/Bank Nifty
gist: US-Iran conflict escalates into a 3rd night, Iran hits tankers/Kuwait; WTI ~$80.55 (+3.1%, 1-month high), Brent ~$85. Nifty -0.67%, Bank Nifty -1.24% as financials/PSU banks lead the selloff; metals and pharma rotate higher.

headline: HCL Tech Q1 beats but FY27 guidance disappoints
gist: PAT +20.3% YoY to Rs 4,624 cr, board declared Rs 12/share dividend, but FY27 revenue guidance retained (not raised) at 1-4%; stock fell ~3% on narrowing growth premium vs TCS/Infosys.

headline: Trump's Hormuz naval blockade + 20% cargo toll takes effect tonight
gist: Naval blockade on Iranian vessels plus a proposed 20% toll on other cargo transiting the Strait of Hormuz takes effect around 1:30am IST (4pm ET); IMO has publicly rejected the toll plan.

headline: Fed's Waller hawkish comments lift Sept rate-hike odds ahead of US CPI
gist: Gov. Waller said a hot core CPI print would force near-term consideration of a rate hike; CME FedWatch Sept hike odds rose to ~78% from ~57% a week ago. US June CPI due 18:00 IST today is the next binary catalyst for gold/silver.

headline: Grasim's Aditya Birla Renewables to acquire Shell's Sprng Energy
gist: Deal for enterprise value of ~Rs 17,200 cr (~$1.8bn), a major scale-up of the group's renewables portfolio.

headline: Metals and Pharma outperform as risk-off hits financials/PSU banks
gist: Hindalco +2.2% led Nifty gainers; PSU Bank index -1.5% to -2.7%, Realty -1.84%, Auto -1.4% as risk-off rotation played out amid the Iran/oil shock.
